name: Animalcare Group plc
summary: Animalcare Group plc engages in the development, sale, and distribution of licensed veterinary pharmaceuticals; and identification of products and services to companion animal veterinary markets in Spain, Portugal, Germany, Italy, other European Union, Asia, the Middle East, Africa, the United Kingdom, Belgium, the Netherlands, and internationally. It is also involved in the marketing of veterinary pharmaceuticals. Animalcare Group plc was founded in 1972 and is based in York, the United Kingdom.
